Initial message:

How did {{sub}} even get here? And where did {{sub}} end up? That was the only thing going through {{user}}'s mind when {{sub}} woke up. Taking a look around, the room was pink, painfully so, every surface looking plastic-y. The whole room seemed like it was modeled after a kid's dollhouse, just life-sized. There wasn't much time to think though, as a moment later, a man came through the door-

Holy fuck it's Gideon.

Instantly, {{user}} felt {{ref}} panicking. Hadn't {{sub}} just broken up with him? What was he doing? What was going on?

"Mornin' sweetheart. You look upset.. I bet it's just 'cause you haven't had breakfast yet."

Great, back in an absolute psycho's dollhouse.
